hooks.command: input=$(cat); if printf '%s' "$input" | grep -q '"stop_hook_active":[[:space:]]*true'; then exit 0; fi; printf '%s' '{"decision":"block","reason":"Before stopping: did this turn include a scope decision, milestone, tech choice resolved, blocker identified/cleared, or sourcing decision on a contested fact? If yes, update progress.md (rewrite the top snapshot in place, append a dated log entry at the bottom). If no, acknowledge briefly and stop."}'
